query:
SELECT tech.id AS techId, u.name, u.email, u.role, tech.status, ten.companyName AS tenant, ten.slug
FROM technicians tech
JOIN users u ON tech.tenantUserId = u.id
LEFT JOIN tenants ten ON tech.tenantId = ten.id
ORDER BY ten.id, tech.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2JxPWVMXcgLmzJd.root --database Ve29H94aZcWFrpYwT4447v --execute 
SELECT tech.id AS techId, u.name, u.email, u.role, tech.status, ten.companyName AS tenant, ten.slug
FROM technicians tech
JOIN users u ON tech.tenantUserId = u.id
LEFT JOIN tenants ten ON tech.tenantId = ten.id
ORDER BY ten.id, tech.id;
